## [00:00 - 03:04]

Hey, this is D-Pesh and I want to show in this video a new method I called a graduation testing automation. GTA for short, GTA method, love the short names. So the data going through is still quite relevant. If you go into kind of purchase, in a shape checkout, etc., I would start extending the impressions on. ## [12:11 - 12:45]

some kind of audit trial as well. And you know, there's something as well as worth considering as you grow out your account. So the next video, I'm going to show you the actual rules. But for this one, the big takeaway is setting up your reports, one for your winners, one for your losers. And then using the process to check in on it once a day, if you're doing higher volume, obviously you can do it more frequently. If you're doing your lower volume, maybe less frequently. But for where we are right now, every morning, one of the first things my media buys will do is to check to see whether we have winners or losers and to make an action off of that.
